translations.我們自行擴充的方法跟原生提供的方法全部混合在一起，難以區分；另外專案規模越大、引: Our custom extension methods get mixed together with the native methods, making them hard to distinguish. Also, as the project grows larger and more packages are used, extension name conflicts may occur. For example, if two packages both extend UIColor with a method called `getCMYK()`, it will cause issues.
